sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check black shape position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Black: row {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, col {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Also check all shapes
print("\nAll shapes:")
for n in seg:
    if n['pixels'] >= 10:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: row {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, col {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving up more and then RIGHT

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] >= 50:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Dark gray after 5 UPs: row {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, col {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Now try RIGHT
action(['RIGHT'])
seg2 = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg2:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] >= 50:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Dark gray after RIGHT: row {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, col {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
